ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file containing the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_type" INTEGER /* Type of data (e.g., stock prices, transaction volumes) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the dataset */,
  "first_label" INTEGER /* First label in the dataset */,
  "first_label_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the first label to the total length */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data points (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date of the first data point in the dataset */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data point in the dataset */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the dataset is currently active or archived */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" INTEGER /* Type of the model (e.g., LSTM, CNN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "threshold_parameters" TEXT /* Threshold parameters used in the model */,
  "training_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of training data to total data */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence used for training */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training process in seconds */,
  "training_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training started */,
  "training_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training ended */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the model is currently active or deprecated */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model (e.g., 0.95) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type FOREIGN KEY ("model_type") REFERENCES model_types ("model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the version is currently active or deprecated */,
  "version_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the version (e.g., 0.95) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error */,
  "tp" INTEGER /* True positives */,
  "fp" INTEGER /* False positives */,
  "fn" INTEGER /* False negatives */,
  "tn" INTEGER /* True negatives */,
  "no_of_anomalies" INTEGER /* Number of anomalies detected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  "evaluation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the evaluation process in seconds */,
  "evaluation_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation started */,
  "evaluation_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation ended */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that detected the anomaly */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset where the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_date" TEXT /* Date of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_value" REAL /* Value of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly (e.g., peak, drop) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly record was last updated */,
  "is_reviewed" INTEGER /* Whether the anomaly has been reviewed by a human */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the anomaly */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was reviewed */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., confirmed, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or deactivated */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "accessed_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the accessed entity (e.g., dataset, model) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the entity */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful or not */,
  "is_admin_access" INTEGER /* Whether the access was performed by an admin */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, anomaly) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the report is accessible to all users or restricted */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Whether the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful or not */,
  "is_admin_access" INTEGER /* Whether the access was performed by an admin */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Time Series, Image) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the data type is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "model_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type (e.g., LSTM, CNN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the model type is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the role is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
